ddls:
CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "inner_outer" TEXT /* Classification of the borough (Inner or Outer London) */,
  "geometry" TEXT /* Geometric shape (polygon) representing the borough's boundaries */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the borough in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (population per square kilometer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population */,
  "population_increase" REAL /* Percentage increase in population */,
  "percent_population_working_age" REAL /* Percentage of the population in the working age (16-64) */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of population by age groups */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of population by gender */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of population by ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the economic data */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "gross_annual_pay" INTEGER /* Average gross annual pay */,
  "active_businesses" INTEGER /* Number of active businesses */,
  "two_year_survival_rate" REAL /* Two-year survival rate of businesses */,
  "employment_by_sector" TEXT /* Number of employed individuals by sector */,
  "business_sectors" TEXT /* Number of businesses by sector */,
  "business_growth_rate" REAL /* Percentage growth in the number of businesses over the previous year */,
  "gdp_contribution" REAL /* Contribution of the borough to the overall GDP of London */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_data" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the crime data */,
  "crime_rate_per_thousand" REAL /* Crime rate per thousand population */,
  "crime_types" TEXT /* Number of crimes by type */,
  "crime_trend" TEXT /* Trend of crime rates over the past few years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_data" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the housing data */,
  "median_house_price" INTEGER /* Median house price */,
  "housing_type_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of housing types */,
  "rental_prices" TEXT /* Median rental prices for different types of properties */,
  "property_age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of properties by age */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the amenities data */,
  "num_hotels" INTEGER /* Number of hotels */,
  "num_parks" INTEGER /* Number of parks */,
  "num_pubs" INTEGER /* Number of pubs */,
  "num_cafes" INTEGER /* Number of cafes */,
  "amenity_types" TEXT /* Types of amenities with additional details */,
  "amenity_ratings" TEXT /* Average ratings for each type of amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was last updated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)
column_names: Classification of the borough (Inner or Outer London)
Geometric shape (polygon) representing the borough's boundaries
Area of the borough in square kilometers
Percentage of the population in the working age (16-64)
Distribution of population by age groups
Number of employed individuals by sector
Percentage growth in the number of businesses over the previous year
Contribution of the borough to the overall GDP of London
Trend of crime rates over the past few years
Median rental prices for different types of properties
Types of amenities with additional details
Average ratings for each type of amenity
Unique identifier for each metadata entry
Timestamp of when the data was created
Timestamp of when the data was last updated
Additional notes or comments about the data
